step_rationale: Structural collagen in fibrous cap; erosion biomarker.
mechanism: COL6A2 expression and integrity in the plaque matrix reflect cap stability; reduced levels indicate erosion-prone remodeling.

references.title: Proteomics Profiling Reveals Insulin-Like Growth Factor 1, Collagen Type VI α-2 Chain, and Fermitin Family Homolog 3 as Potential Biomarkers of Plaque Erosion in ST-Segment Elevated Myocardial Infarction.
references.journal: Circulation journal : official journal of the Japanese Circulation Society
